description: You are a senior software architect at a growing e-commerce startup refactoring an unmaintainable monolith project. Refactor the ecommerce-monolith project from /home/ga/ecommerce-monolith into a multi-module Maven project at /home/ga/ecommerce-refactored. The new project must contain three modules: ecommerce-api (model/domain classes), ecommerce-persistence (repository classes, depending on ecommerce-api), and ecommerce-service (service classes, depending on both ecommerce-api and ecommerce-persistence). Ensure each module uses groupId 'com.example' and version '1.0-SNAPSHOT', preserves the 'com.example.ecommerce.*' package structure, and that the parent POM correctly lists all modules. The refactored project must build successfully using 'mvn clean install' from the root directory.
